nodes.name: Diglossa
nodes.summary: Diglossa（Diglossa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Chestnut-bellied flowerpiercer、Glossy flowerpiercer、Moustached flowerpiercer等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Moustached flowerpiercer
nodes.summary: The moustached flowerpiercer (Diglossa mystacalis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It was first described by French ornithologist Frédéric de Lafresnaye in 1846. It is found in Bolivia and Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland, and heavily degraded former forest. References
